results.title: Aaron-Wooi Yik let pressure get the better of them, says Herry
results.description: PETALING JAYA: Men's doubles head coach Herry Iman Pierngadi admitted that his charges, Aaron Chia-Soh Wooi Yik, were too eager to win and that pressure ultimately contributed to their defeat in the Malaysian Masters semi-finals on Saturday (May 23).
